params.note: Hybrid baseline with 26 queries (4 multi_hop). GPU re-index of codebase-indexer-mcp via bundled Ollama unclemusclez/jina-embeddings-v2-base-code @ 768. RERANK_ENABLED=false. multi_hop_2hop.note: Two-hop client RRF (eval_multihop.py) on 4 multi_hop queries; hop1+hop2 fused vs single-pass multi_hop recall@10 0.333333 in metrics_by_tag. Frozen Jina reference (2026-07-02) multi_hop_2hop recall@10 was 0.333333.
